title: Over-The-Toilet Metal Storage Organizer
description: Add three spacious shelves above your toilet. This freestanding organizer fits over standard toilets and doesn't require wall-mounting hardware. High storage capacity.

title: Luxury Waffle Weave Cotton Bath Towels
description: Transform your bathing experience with these fast-drying waffle weave towels made from 100% long-staple Turkish cotton. Exceptionally soft and highly absorbent.

title: Adhesive Corner Shower Caddy Shelves
description: Organize shampoos and soaps. These rustproof stainless steel corner shelves mount securely with powerful adhesive brackets that peel off clean when moving out.

title: Modern Ceramic Bathroom Accessory Set
description: Unify your countertop styling with this 4-piece set including a soap dispenser, toothbrush holder, tumbler, and a matching soap dish in matching cream white.
